scripts.api:dev: cd backend && if not exist .bin mkdir .bin && go build -o ./.bin/api.exe ./cmd/api && ./.bin/api.exe
scripts.api:migrate: cd backend && if not exist .bin mkdir .bin && go build -o ./.bin/migrate.exe ./cmd/migrate && ./.bin/migrate.exe up
scripts.api:migrate:status: cd backend && if not exist .bin mkdir .bin && go build -o ./.bin/migrate.exe ./cmd/migrate && ./.bin/migrate.exe status
scripts.api:migrate:down: cd backend && if not exist .bin mkdir .bin && go build -o ./.bin/migrate.exe ./cmd/migrate && ./.bin/migrate.exe down
scripts.api:seed: cd backend && if not exist .bin mkdir .bin && go build -o ./.bin/seed.exe ./cmd/seed && ./.bin/seed.exe
